name: IZEA Worldwide, Inc.
business: IZEA Worldwide, Inc. is a technology-enabled influencer marketing company that delivers creator economy solutions for marketers through managed services supported by proprietary technology. It primarily serves enterprise brands and agencies, as well as small- and mid-sized businesses, by providing custom content, influencer marketing, and campaign management services.

exposures.sentence: We have also provided AI-enabled tools designed to support content creation and operational efficiency within the influencer marketing process.
We rely on third-party social media platforms such as Facebook/Instagram (collectively known as Meta), TikTok, X (formerly Twitter), and YouTube for core aspects of influencer data.

catalysts.sentence: We believe that our bookings will show comparative growth beginning in early 2026.

catalysts.event: Favorable revenue comparisons in second half 2026
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate more favorable comparisons in the second half of 2026 as revenue increasingly reflects our current mix of core enterprise engagements.

tamClaims.claim: Total global addressable market of the creator economy projected to rise to $480 billion by 2027.
tamClaims.sentence: the total global addressable market of the creator economy is projected to continue to rise to $480 billion by 2027.

tamClaims.claim: Budget spent on influencer marketing campaigns tripled between 2019 and 2025 to more than $9 billion.
tamClaims.sentence: Budget spent on influencer marketing campaigns tripled between 2019 and 2025 to more than $9 billion.
